name: io.github.Piccolo123/url-manager-mcp
description: Agent-first URL collection & knowledge management MCP server. AI agents auto-register, collect, categorize, tag, search, and share web bookmarks across devices. 16 tools with full CRUD, batch operations, collaborative shared categories, and magic-link delivery.

environmentVariables.description: URL Manager API token. Leave empty for agent-first auto-registration.
environmentVariables.name: FOOTPRINTS_TOKEN
